controls.label: Enable protection for Username Enumeration via WordPress REST API
controls.help: Turns on protection for Username Enumeration via WordPress REST API. This helps secure the site against Authentication attacks.

mappings.UI-RISK-003-001:
# BEGIN VAPT RISK-003
# Requires: mod_rewrite | AllowOverride: FileInfo or All
# Position: BEFORE # BEGIN WordPress
<IfModule mod_rewrite.c>
    RewriteEngine On
    RewriteBase /
    RewriteRule ^wp-json/wp/v2/users$ - [F,L]
    RewriteRule ^wp-json/wp/v2/users/ - [F,L]
</IfModule>
# END VAPT RISK-003
